zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Lexington於1195年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾圖福德時，她的父親Richard of Lexington30歲，母親Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England25歲。她於1215年之前與Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1240年在英國英格蘭戴文素斯 莫爾頓享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Lexington于1195年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾圖福德时，她的父亲Richard of Lexington30岁，母亲Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England25岁。她于1215年之前与Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1240年在英国英格兰戴文素斯 莫爾頓享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lexington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Lexington was born in 1195, in Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Richard of Lexington, was 30 and her mother, Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, was 25. She married Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton before 1215, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1240, in South Molton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Lexington est née en 1195, à Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard of Lexington, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton avant 1215, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1240, à South Molton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Lexington 1195 in Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard of Lexington 30 und ihre Mutter Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England 25. Sie hat vor 1215 in England Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1240 im Alter von 45 Jahren in South Molton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Lexington è nata il nel 1195 nel Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Richard of Lexington, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton prima del 1215, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1240, nel South Molton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Lexingtonが1195年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアトゥクスフォードで生まれた時，父Richard of Lexingtonは30歳，母Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Englandは25歳であった。1215年以前にイギリスでRowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Suttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1240年にイギリスイギリスデボンソウス モルトンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Lexington(이)가 1195년 영국 노틴그함실르 투스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard of Lexington(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1215년 이전 영국에서 Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 소우스 모턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Lexington nasceu em 1195, em Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard of Lexington, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton antes 1215, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Sutton On Trent, Nottinghamshire, Englan: суттон он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Lexington родилась в 1195 г. в местности туксфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard of Lexington было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton перед 1215 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1240 г. в местности соут молтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
